name: Solo Brands, Inc.
business: Solo Brands operates four premium outdoor brands: Solo Stove, Chubbies, Oru Kayak, and International Surf Ventures (ISLE), offering products like portable fire pits, camping stoves, apparel, kayaks, and paddle boards. The company sells directly to consumers through e-commerce and owned retail stores, as well as through retail partners. Net sales are concentrated in the United States, with a growing international presence.
sellsTo: retail partners (outdoor and sporting goods retailers)

exposures.sentence: Solo Brands operates four premium outdoor brands: Solo Stove, Oru Kayak (Oru), International Surf Ventures (ISLE) and Chubbies.
We follow a digital-first strategy which prioritizes a direct connection with customers through e-commerce channels.

catalysts.sentence: Pursuant to the Merger Agreement, effective January 1, 2026 (the Effective Time), Merger Sub was merged with and into Holdings, with Holdings continuing as the surviving entity (the Merger) as our wholly owned subsidiary of Solo Brands, Inc.

catalysts.event: First full measurement period for financial covenants under Amended Credit Agreement
catalysts.sentence: The Company must comply with financial covenants under the 2025 Refinancing Amendment, including a minimum fixed charge coverage ratio, a maximum leverage ratio and a minimum liquidity amount, with the first full measurement period for such financial covenants to occur in the third quarter of 2026.
